summary: Customer/Expert panel project with ticket creation flow, payment handling, and dashboard modifications.
architectural_notes: Ticket creation flow: only a minimum $1 fixed charge is required (no full payment script)
Chat remains disabled for customers by design
known_issues: Full payment requirement was blocking customers from creating tickets (being removed)

existing_features.title: Remove the chat/ticket history section (ServiceHistoryTimeline and any related 'History' tab) from the CustomerDashboard and ClientPortal entirely. The tab and its contents should not appear in the customer-facing UI.

Remove the full payment requirement that blocks ticket creation in TicketCreationForm. Replace it with a minimum fixed charge of $1 USD. The ticket creation flow should proceed after a $1 charge is processed, not the full session payment. Eliminate any logic that enforces the full payment script before ticket submission.

new_feature_requests.summary: Remove chat/ticket history section from customer dashboard entirely
Disable auto-scroll to top on both customer and expert panels
Remove full payment requirement for ticket creation; implement minimum $1 fixed charge only

Disable any automatic scroll-to-top behavior on both the CustomerDashboard and ExpertDashboard panels. When switching tabs or navigating within these dashboards, the page/panel should remain at its current scroll position.

projectName: Customer Panel Modifications: Remove History, Disable Auto-Scroll, Simplify Ticket Payment
